_comment: Document references are just fields in the record data — content-addressed filenames under documents/. Merge carries them through LWW like any other field; the newer version's hashes win. The actual blobs are synced separately and are not part of the merge.

uuid-app-9._won_from: C3D4 @ 12:30 — regenerated docs replace A1B2's draft (9f2c4a.pdf, no cover)
